prerequisites: A Google account with access to the Google Form you want to sync.
A Google Cloud project with the Google Forms API enabled (APIs & Services > Library).
An OAuth consent screen configured for the project with the required Google Forms read scopes added.
An OAuth 2.0 client ID and client secret created in the Google Cloud Console (Credentials > Create credentials > OAuth client ID).
An OAuth refresh token obtained for the authorized Google account.
The form_id of the target Google Form (found in the form's edit URL: docs.google.com/forms/d/<form_id>/edit).

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 (refresh token)
authMethods.summary: The Google Forms API authorizes requests with OAuth 2.0. Supply the OAuth client_id and client_secret from your Google Cloud project together with a client_refresh_token for the authorized Google account; the connector exchanges the refresh token for short-lived access tokens. Grant read-only scopes such as https://www.googleapis.com/auth/forms.body.readonly (to read form structure via forms.get) and https://www.googleapis.com/auth/forms.responses.readonly (to read responses via forms.responses.list).

setupSteps.title: Enable the Google Forms API
setupSteps.body: In the Google Cloud Console, open APIs & Services > Library, search for the Google Forms API, and enable it for your project. The API is served from https://forms.googleapis.com.

setupSteps.title: Configure the OAuth consent screen and scopes
setupSteps.body: Open APIs & Services > OAuth consent screen, fill in the app name and support email, and add the read scopes the connector needs: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/forms.body.readonly for form content and https://www.googleapis.com/auth/forms.responses.readonly for responses. These are sensitive scopes and may require verification.

setupSteps.title: Create OAuth client credentials
setupSteps.body: In APIs & Services > Credentials, click Create credentials > OAuth client ID, choose an application type, and create the client. Copy the generated client ID into the client_id field and the client secret into the client_secret field.

setupSteps.title: Obtain a refresh token
setupSteps.body: Complete the OAuth 2.0 authorization flow with the authorized Google account and the scopes above to obtain a refresh token, then provide it in the client_refresh_token field. The connector uses it to mint access tokens for each sync.

setupSteps.title: Provide the form ID
setupSteps.body: Set the required form_id field to the ID of the Google Form to sync. Find it in the form's edit URL (docs.google.com/forms/d/<form_id>/edit). The connector passes this ID to forms.get and forms.responses.list.

sources.title: Setting up OAuth 2.0 (create client ID and secret)
